summary: Iteration 84: Tested Dual Grading System implementation for The HoneyGroove vinyl marketplace. All features verified successfully - compact grade labels on listing cards, pill variant in modals with honey branding, tooltips with descriptions, listing form dropdown with 5 grade options, and legacy condition normalization.
passed_tests: FRONTEND: Honeypot marketplace page loads correctly - PASSED
FRONTEND: Compact grade labels (data-testid='grade-label-compact') display on listing cards with format 'VG+🍯' - PASSED
FRONTEND: Grade labels contain standard code (NM, VG+, VG, G+, F) - PASSED
FRONTEND: Grade labels contain honey emojis (🍯, 🐝, 👑, 🫠) - PASSED
FRONTEND: Listing detail modal opens correctly (data-testid='listing-detail-modal') - PASSED
FRONTEND: GradeLabel pill variant (data-testid='grade-label-pill') displays in modal with full honey branding 'VG+ - The Sweet Spot 🍯' - PASSED
FRONTEND: Pill variant shows 'Code - Honey Label' format - PASSED
FRONTEND: Tooltip appears on hover over grade label pill - PASSED
FRONTEND: Tooltip shows grade code, full name, and description (e.g. 'VG+ (Very Good Plus)A beautiful spinner with only light signs of handling...') - PASSED
FRONTEND: Listing form condition dropdown (data-testid='list-condition-select') opens - PASSED
FRONTEND: Dropdown shows exactly 5 GRADE_OPTIONS - PASSED
FRONTEND: Option 1: 'NM - Queen's Choice 👑🍯' - PASSED
FRONTEND: Option 2: 'VG+ - The Sweet Spot 🍯' - PASSED
FRONTEND: Option 3: 'VG - Hive Classic 🐝' - PASSED
FRONTEND: Option 4: 'G+ / G - Well-Worn Honeycomb 🍯🐝' - PASSED
FRONTEND: Option 5: 'F / P - Sticky Situation 🫠🍯' - PASSED
FRONTEND: Trades page loads with correct structure (Active/History tabs) - PASSED
FRONTEND: Orders page loads with correct structure (My Orders/My Sales tabs) - PASSED
FRONTEND: Global search listings section shows formatted grade display - PASSED
FRONTEND: Global search shows honey-branded grade display and standard grade codes - PASSED
FRONTEND: No console errors or broken UI from grading changes - PASSED
critical_code_review_comments: grading.js: GRADE_MAP contains all 7 grades (NM, VG+, VG, G+, G, F, P) with honey labels, emojis, and descriptions
grading.js: GRADE_OPTIONS provides 5 grouped tiers for dropdowns
grading.js: LEGACY_MAP properly normalizes old conditions (Near Mint→NM, Very Good Plus→VG+, etc.)
grading.js: normalizeGrade() handles both standard codes and legacy long-form values
GradeLabel.js: 3 variants (pill, compact, inline) with TooltipProvider for hover descriptions
ISOPage.js: Line 720-722 correctly uses GRADE_OPTIONS in condition Select dropdown
ISOPage.js: Line 1045 correctly uses GradeLabel compact variant on listing cards
ListingDetailModal.js: Line 189-191 correctly uses GradeLabel pill variant
TradesPage.js: Line 938 uses GradeLabel compact in RecordDetail
TradesPage.js: Line 1089-1091 uses GradeLabel compact for listing condition in ProposeTradeModal
TradesPage.js: Line 1108-1117 uses GRADE_OPTIONS for condition buttons
OrdersPage.js: Line 176 uses formatGradeDisplay for inline display
OrdersPage.js: Line 220 uses GradeLabel pill variant in expanded order view
GlobalSearch.js: Line 396 uses formatGradeDisplay for listing conditions
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user and marketplace listings
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dual Grading System fully implemented. GradeLabel component supports 3 variants (pill, compact, inline). GRADE_OPTIONS dropdown shows 5 honey-branded tiers. Legacy conditions (Near Mint, Very Good Plus, etc.) are normalized via LEGACY_MAP in grading.js. Tooltip descriptions appear on hover. Test user has existing listings with VG+ condition that display correctly.

mocked_integrations.email_sending: Resend email service is MOCKED - confirmation emails are logged but not sent
